summary: Implemented YAML config file loader with Load(path string) (*Config, error). Config struct has Projects []ProjectConfig and Server ServerConfig matching tech design. ServerConfig.Port defaults to 8080 when omitted. Supports environment variable expansion via os.ExpandEnv and tilde (~) expansion for home directory. Returns ErrConfigInvalid for missing file, malformed YAML, or empty projects list. 9 unit tests with 100% coverage.
keyDecisions: Config, ProjectConfig, and ServerConfig structs defined in internal/config package (not internal/model) since they are config-layer types, not shared models
Tilde expansion uses os.UserHomeDir() with filepath.Join for cross-platform support
Environment variable expansion applied after tilde expansion to allow $VAR paths to override
ErrConfigInvalid from internal/model reused for all error cases to stay consistent with existing error types

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Config struct matches tech design: Projects []ProjectConfig, Server ServerConfig
ProjectConfig has Name and Path fields with YAML tags
Returns ErrConfigInvalid for missing file or malformed YAML
Validates that at least one project is defined
Unit tests: valid config loads, missing file returns error, invalid YAML returns error, default port applied

notes: Config types defined in internal/config package rather than internal/model since they are specific to config loading and not shared across layers. If other layers need them, they can import from config package.
